nodes.name: POST /farms
nodes.description: Create a new farm with name, location, boundary, and farm type.

nodes.name: GET /farms
nodes.description: List all farms with optional pagination and filtering.

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}
nodes.description: Get details for a specific farm by ID.

nodes.name: PATCH /farms/{farm_id}
nodes.description: Partially update a farm's name, location, boundary, or metadata.

nodes.name: DELETE /farms/{farm_id}
nodes.description: Delete farm with cascade deletion of blocks, harvests, alerts, archives.

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}/summary
nodes.description: Get a summary of a farm including block counts and status distribution.

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}/analytics
nodes.description: Get farm-level analytics: yield metrics, state breakdown, block comparison.

nodes.name: GET /farms/analytics/global
nodes.description: Cross-farm analytics aggregation covering all farms.

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}/farming-years
nodes.description: Get farming year configuration for a specific farm.

nodes.name: POST /farms/{farm_id}/blocks
nodes.description: Create a new block within a farm with crop, area, and row configuration.

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}/blocks
nodes.description: List blocks for a farm with optional status/crop filtering.

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}
nodes.description: Get full block details including KPI, IoT, and status history.

nodes.name: PATCH /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/status
nodes.description: Transition block between lifecycle states (e.g. planted -> growing -> harvesting).

nodes.name: GET /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/analytics
nodes.description: Get block-level analytics: yield trends, timeline, performance metrics.

nodes.name: POST /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/virtual-crops
nodes.description: Add a virtual crop sub-block to a multi-crop parent block.

nodes.name: PATCH /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/iot-controller
nodes.description: Update IoT controller configuration (address, port, credentials) for a block.

nodes.name: CRUD /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/harvests
nodes.description: CRUD for block harvest records with summary and farm-level aggregation.

nodes.name: CRUD /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/alerts
nodes.description: CRUD for block alerts with resolve/dismiss, active alerts, and farm-level listing.

nodes.name: GET /dashboard
nodes.description: Farm dashboard summary, quick transitions, quick harvest, KPI recalculation.

nodes.name: CRUD /tasks
nodes.description: Farm task management: my-tasks, pending-count, CRUD, complete, harvest entry.

nodes.name: GET /archives
nodes.description: Block archives: cycle history, performance analytics, crop comparison.

nodes.name: CRUD /plant-data
nodes.description: Simple plant data CRUD with CSV import/export.

nodes.name: CRUD /plant-data-enhanced
nodes.description: Enhanced plant data with growth cycles, fertigation schedules, search, clone.

nodes.name: GET /weather
nodes.description: Weather endpoints: current, forecast, agri-data, cache stats, refresh.

nodes.name: POST /farms/{farm_id}/blocks/{block_id}/ai/chat
nodes.description: Farm AI chat using Vertex AI Gemini with SenseHub tool execution.

nodes.name: CRUD /sensehub
nodes.description: SenseHub proxy: connect/disconnect, dashboard, equipment, automations, alerts, relay control.

nodes.name: CRUD /plantings
nodes.description: Planting plan management: create, mark planted, get, list.

nodes.name: CRUD /config
nodes.description: Spacing standards CRUD, plant calculator, farming year configuration.

nodes.name: CRUD /inventory
nodes.description: Farm inventory: harvest/input/asset CRUD, movements, transfers, waste management.

nodes.name: GET /managers
nodes.description: List users with manager/admin roles for farm assignment.

nodes.name: FarmService
nodes.description: Farm CRUD orchestration delegating to FarmRepository.

nodes.name: FarmRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'farms' collection.

nodes.name: FarmAnalyticsService
nodes.description: Computes farm-level analytics: yield metrics, state breakdown, block comparison.

nodes.name: GlobalAnalyticsService
nodes.description: Cross-farm analytics aggregation using FarmAnalyticsService and FarmRepository.

nodes.name: BlockService
nodes.description: Block lifecycle management with VALID_TRANSITIONS state machine, KPI recalc, archiving.

nodes.name: BlockRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'blocks' collection with filtering and aggregation.

nodes.name: HarvestService
nodes.description: Block harvest CRUD with quality grade mapping to inventory integration.

nodes.name: HarvestRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'block_harvests' collection.

nodes.name: AlertService
nodes.description: Block alert CRUD with resolve/dismiss and active alert queries.

nodes.name: AlertRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'block_alerts' collection.

nodes.name: ArchiveService
nodes.description: Block archive CRUD with performance analytics and crop comparison.

nodes.name: ArchiveRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'block_archives' collection.

nodes.name: BlockAnalyticsService
nodes.description: Block-level analytics: yield trends, timeline, task stats, performance metrics.

nodes.name: VirtualBlockService
nodes.description: Multi-crop virtual block management: add/empty virtual crops under parent blocks.

nodes.name: TaskService
nodes.description: Farm task CRUD: create, assign, complete, harvest entry, cancel.

nodes.name: TaskRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'farm_tasks' collection.

nodes.name: TaskGeneratorService
nodes.description: Auto-generates tasks on block state transitions (e.g. planting, harvesting).

nodes.name: HarvestAggregatorService
nodes.description: Daily aggregation of harvest entries into block_harvests (runs at 23:00).

nodes.name: CascadeDeletionService
nodes.description: Cascade deletion: moves farms/blocks/harvests/archives to deleted_* collections.

nodes.name: WeatherService
nodes.description: Weather data retrieval via WeatherBit API with caching.

nodes.name: WeatherCacheService
nodes.description: Server-side weather response caching with TTL management.

nodes.name: WeatherAPIClient
nodes.description: HTTP client for WeatherBit API (current, forecast, agri data).

nodes.name: SenseHubClient
nodes.description: HTTP client for SenseHub edge devices: equipment, automations, alerts, relay control.

nodes.name: SenseHubMCPClient
nodes.description: MCP protocol client for SenseHub with dynamic tool discovery via SSE transport.

nodes.name: SenseHubConnectionService
nodes.description: SenseHub connection lifecycle: connect, disconnect, status, get_client, get_mcp_client.

nodes.name: FarmAIChatService
nodes.description: Orchestrates Vertex AI Gemini chat with SenseHub tool execution and confirmation flow.

nodes.name: ConfigService
nodes.description: Spacing standards configuration stored in 'system_config' collection.

nodes.name: FarmingYearService
nodes.description: Configurable farming year periods for analytics date ranges.

nodes.name: PlantDataService
nodes.description: Simple plant data CRUD with CSV import/export.

nodes.name: PlantDataRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'plant_data' collection.

nodes.name: PlantDataEnhancedService
nodes.description: Enhanced plant data CRUD with growth cycles, fertigation, search, clone.

nodes.name: PlantDataEnhancedRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'plant_data_enhanced' collection.

nodes.name: PlantingService
nodes.description: Planting plan management: create plan, mark planted, list plantings.

nodes.name: PlantingRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'plantings' collection.

nodes.name: FarmDatabaseManager
nodes.description: Database manager delegating to core MongoDB; creates indexes for 20+ farm collections.

nodes.name: Farm
nodes.description: Farm Pydantic model with location, boundary, metadata, and farmId.

nodes.name: Block
nodes.description: Block model with status lifecycle, KPI, IoT controller, virtual crop support.

nodes.name: BlockHarvest
nodes.description: Harvest record model with quality grades and metadata.

nodes.name: BlockAlert
nodes.description: Block alert model with severity, status, category, and comments.

nodes.name: BlockArchive
nodes.description: Archive record for completed block cycles with yield and alert summaries.

nodes.name: FarmTask
nodes.description: Farm task model with type, priority, status, and harvest entry support.

nodes.name: PlantDataEnhanced
nodes.description: Enhanced plant library with growth cycles, fertigation, environmental requirements.

nodes.name: PlantData
nodes.description: Simple plant data model (legacy format).

nodes.name: HarvestInventory
nodes.description: Comprehensive inventory models: harvest, input, asset, waste types with movements and transfers.

nodes.name: DashboardSummary
nodes.description: Dashboard summary models with block states, harvest data, and farming year context.

nodes.name: FarmAnalyticsResponse
nodes.description: Farm analytics response models: aggregated metrics, state breakdown, trends.

nodes.name: GlobalAnalyticsResponse
nodes.description: Global analytics response aggregating across all farms.

nodes.name: CurrentWeather
nodes.description: Weather models: current conditions, agricultural forecast, cache entries.

nodes.name: CRUD /hr/employees
nodes.description: Employee CRUD with Arabic name support, Emirates ID handling, pagination.

nodes.name: CRUD /hr/contracts
nodes.description: Employment contract management CRUD.

nodes.name: CRUD /hr/visas
nodes.description: Employee visa tracking and management.

nodes.description: Employee insurance policy management.

nodes.name: CRUD /hr/performance

nodes.description: Visa tracking CRUD with VisaRepository.

nodes.name: InsuranceService
nodes.description: Insurance policy CRUD with InsuranceRepository.

nodes.name: PerformanceService
nodes.description: Performance review CRUD with PerformanceRepository.

nodes.name: HRDatabaseManager
nodes.description: HR database manager with indexes for employees, contracts, visas, insurance, performance.

nodes.name: Employee
nodes.description: Employee model with Arabic name support, Emirates ID, emergency contacts.

nodes.name: Contract
nodes.description: Employment contract model with type, status, salary.

nodes.name: CRUD /crm/customers
nodes.description: Customer CRUD with address management and type/status filtering.

nodes.name: CustomerService
nodes.description: Customer CRUD orchestration with CustomerRepository.

nodes.name: CustomerRepository
nodes.description: MongoDB data access for 'customers' collection.

nodes.name: CRMDatabaseManager
nodes.description: CRM database manager with customer collection indexes.

nodes.name: Customer
nodes.description: Customer model with type, status, address, and contact info.

nodes.name: CRUD /sales/orders
nodes.description: Sales order CRUD with customer integration and status tracking.

nodes.name: CRUD /sales/inventory

nodes.description: Purchase order management for procurement.

nodes.name: CRUD /sales/returns
nodes.description: Sales returns processing and restocking.

nodes.description: Sales order orchestration integrating with CRM customers and farm inventory.

nodes.name: PurchaseOrderService

nodes.description: Delivery route CRUD with RouteRepository.

nodes.description: Logistics database manager with indexes for shipments, vehicles, routes.

nodes.name: Shipment
nodes.description: Shipment model with cargo items, tracking, and order assignment.

nodes.name: CRUD /marketing/campaigns
nodes.description: Marketing campaign CRUD with budget and channel integration.

nodes.name: CRUD /marketing/budgets
nodes.description: Marketing budget allocation and tracking.

nodes.name: CRUD /marketing/channels
nodes.description: Marketing channel management with metrics tracking.

nodes.description: Marketing event planning and management.

nodes.description: Campaign orchestration using BudgetRepository and ChannelRepository.

nodes.name: BudgetService
nodes.description: Budget allocation CRUD with BudgetRepository.

nodes.name: ChannelService
nodes.description: Marketing channel CRUD with ChannelRepository.

nodes.name: EventService
nodes.description: Marketing event CRUD with EventRepository.

nodes.name: MarketingDatabaseManager
nodes.description: Marketing database manager with indexes for campaigns, budgets, channels, events.

nodes.name: Campaign

nodes.name: POST /ai/chat
nodes.description: AI analytics chat endpoint: NL-to-MongoDB query via Vertex AI Gemini.

nodes.name: QueryEngine
nodes.description: Full NL-to-MongoDB pipeline: schema discovery, Gemini query gen, execution, formatting.

nodes.name: GeminiService
nodes.description: Vertex AI Gemini API client for NL-to-MongoDB query generation.

nodes.name: SchemaService
nodes.description: Auto-discovers MongoDB collection schemas by sampling documents.

nodes.name: CostTrackingService
nodes.description: Logs AI query costs to 'ai_query_log' collection for usage tracking.

nodes.name: QueryValidator
nodes.description: Validates generated MongoDB queries for safety (blocks destructive operations).

nodes.name: ChatQueryResponse
nodes.description: AI chat request/response models with query info, visualization suggestions, cost info.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.description: Pydantic BaseSettings with 30+ env vars: DB, auth, AI, rate limiting, CORS.

nodes.name: UserRole
nodes.description: Core user models: role enum, registration, authentication tokens, MFA.

nodes.name: ModuleConfig
nodes.description: Module management models: config, status, health, audit log.

nodes.name: DashboardConfig
nodes.description: Core dashboard widget models for configurable dashboard layouts.

nodes.name: get_current_active_user
nodes.description: JWT token validation and user extraction dependency for FastAPI routes.

nodes.name: RoleChecker
nodes.description: Role-based access control dependency checking user roles against allowed list.

nodes.name: RateLimiter
nodes.description: Redis-backed rate limiting with in-memory fallback, per-role limits.

nodes.name: TimingMiddleware
nodes.description: Request timing middleware adding X-Response-Time header to all responses.

edges.context: Farm API endpoints delegate to FarmService for all CRUD operations.
Farm deletion uses CascadeDeletionService to archive all related data.
Farm analytics endpoint delegates to FarmAnalyticsService.
Global analytics endpoint delegates to GlobalAnalyticsService.
Block API endpoints delegate to BlockService for lifecycle management.
Virtual crop endpoints delegate to VirtualBlockService.
Block analytics endpoint delegates to BlockAnalyticsService.
Harvest API delegates to HarvestService.
Alert API delegates to AlertService.
Archive API delegates to ArchiveService.
Task API delegates to TaskService.
Task API uses TaskGeneratorService for auto-generation endpoints.
Task API uses HarvestAggregatorService for harvest aggregation endpoints.
Weather API delegates to WeatherService.
Weather API uses WeatherCacheService for cache management endpoints.
SenseHub API delegates to SenseHubConnectionService for connection management.
Farm AI chat API delegates to FarmAIChatService.
Config API delegates to ConfigService for spacing standards.
Config API delegates to FarmingYearService for farming year CRUD.
Plant data API delegates to PlantDataService.
Enhanced plant data API delegates to PlantDataEnhancedService.
Planting API delegates to PlantingService.
FarmService delegates DB operations to FarmRepository.
BlockService delegates DB operations to BlockRepository.
BlockService reads harvest data for KPI calculation.
BlockService triggers task generation on state transitions.
HarvestService delegates DB operations to HarvestRepository.
HarvestService reads block info to validate and update KPI.
AlertService delegates DB operations to AlertRepository.
ArchiveService delegates DB operations to ArchiveRepository.
TaskService delegates DB operations to TaskRepository.
VirtualBlockService reads/writes block data via BlockRepository.
VirtualBlockService looks up plant data for virtual crop creation.
PlantDataService delegates DB operations to PlantDataRepository.
PlantDataEnhancedService delegates DB operations to PlantDataEnhancedRepository.
PlantingService delegates DB operations to PlantingRepository.
FarmAnalyticsService reads block data for analytics calculations.
FarmAnalyticsService reads harvest data for yield analytics.
GlobalAnalyticsService aggregates per-farm analytics from FarmAnalyticsService.
GlobalAnalyticsService reads farm list to iterate across all farms.
WeatherService calls WeatherBit API via WeatherAPIClient.
SenseHubConnectionService creates SenseHubClient instances for blocks.
SenseHubConnectionService creates MCP client when mcpApiKey is configured.
Farm AI chat service gets SenseHub clients for tool execution.
FarmAIChatService reads GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT, VERTEX_AI_MODEL, etc. from settings.
CascadeDeletionService accesses deleted_* collections via farm_db.
FarmRepository reads/writes 'farms' collection via farm_db.
BlockRepository reads/writes 'blocks' collection via farm_db.
HarvestRepository reads/writes 'block_harvests' collection via farm_db.
AlertRepository reads/writes 'block_alerts' collection via farm_db.
ArchiveRepository reads/writes 'block_archives' collection via farm_db.
TaskRepository reads/writes 'farm_tasks' collection via farm_db.
All farm_manager API endpoints use get_current_active_user dependency.
Employee API delegates to EmployeeService.
Contract API delegates to ContractService.
Visa API delegates to VisaService.
Insurance API delegates to InsuranceService.
Performance API delegates to PerformanceService.
EmployeeService delegates DB operations to EmployeeRepository.
EmployeeRepository reads/writes 'employees' collection via hr_db.
Customer API delegates to CustomerService.
CustomerService delegates DB operations to CustomerRepository.
CustomerRepository reads/writes 'customers' collection via crm_db.
Order API delegates to OrderService.
OrderService delegates DB operations to OrderRepository.
OrderRepository reads/writes 'sales_orders' collection via sales_db.
OrderService looks up customer data from CRM for order creation.
OrderService reads farm_manager inventory collections for stock checks.
ShipmentService links shipments to sales orders for fulfillment.
Shipment API delegates to ShipmentService.
ShipmentService delegates DB operations to ShipmentRepository.
ShipmentRepository reads/writes 'shipments' collection via logistics_db.
Campaign API delegates to CampaignService.
CampaignService uses BudgetService for budget allocation.
AI chat API delegates to QueryEngine for NL-to-MongoDB pipeline.
QueryEngine uses GeminiService for NL-to-MongoDB query generation.
QueryEngine uses SchemaService to discover MongoDB schemas.
QueryEngine validates generated queries via QueryValidator.
QueryEngine logs query costs via CostTrackingService.
GeminiService reads VERTEX_AI_MODEL and GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT from settings.
